headlines.headline: Nerven Grid reports record quarterly revenue, up 15% year-over-year

sentiment.reasoning: Record revenue growth of 15% year-over-year provides strong fundamental validation of the company's current business trajectory.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
